scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.electron:build-deps: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build
scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:build-deps && cd electron && npx electron dist/main.js
scripts.electron:build: npm run electron:build-deps && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config ../electron-builder.config.js
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run electron:build-deps && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config ../electron-builder.config.js --mac
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run electron:build-deps && cd electron && npx electron-builder --config ../electron-builder.config.js --win
